title: PruneRelationsResponse
description: Response emitted by `sqlite-graphrag prune-relations` on stdout as a single JSON line.

action.description: Whether relationships were actually deleted or just counted.

relation.description: The relation type that was pruned (e.g. 'mentions').

count.description: Number of relationships deleted (or that would be deleted in dry_run).

entities_affected.description: Number of distinct entities whose degree was recalculated.

namespace.description: Namespace in which the prune was executed.
